fixtures._comment: tool-rendering-custom-catchall — 'weather in Tokyo' first turn. Emits get_weather tool call. The custom wildcard renderer fires for ANY tool the integration didn't register a per-tool renderer for, rendering [data-testid='custom-wildcard-card'][data-tool-name='get_weather'].
tool-rendering-custom-catchall — weather follow-up after tool result.

response.content: Tokyo is 22°C and partly cloudy with a gentle easterly breeze.

fixtures._comment: tool-rendering-custom-catchall — 'AAPL stock price' second turn. Emits get_stock_price tool call. The custom wildcard renderer fires again with [data-tool-name='get_stock_price']. The cross-tool assertion verifies BOTH tool names rendered through the same custom-wildcard-card testid.
tool-rendering-custom-catchall — stock follow-up after tool result.

response.content: AAPL is trading at $338.37, down 2.96% on the day.
